sentences.arabic: أَعْتَقِدُ أَنَّ الشَّخْصَ السَّعِيدَ يُسْعِدُ مَنْ حَوْلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Smatram da sretna osoba usrećuje one oko sebe.
sentences.translationEn: I believe that a happy person makes those around them happy.

sentences.arabic: السَّعَادَةُ تَنْتَشِرُ مِثْلَ الضَّوْءِ مِنْ شَخْصٍ لِآخَرَ.
sentences.translation: Sreća se širi poput svjetla od jedne osobe do druge.
sentences.translationEn: Happiness spreads like light from one person to another.

sentences.arabic: أَجِدُ سَعَادَتِي فِي الْأَشْيَاءِ الْبَسِيطَةِ مِثْلَ كُوبِ شَايٍ.
sentences.translation: Svoju sreću nalazim u jednostavnim stvarima poput šolje čaja.
sentences.translationEn: I find my happiness in simple things like a cup of tea.

sentences.arabic: لَا تَنْتَظِرِ السَّعَادَةَ بَلِ اصْنَعْهَا بِنَفْسِكَ.
sentences.translation: Ne čekaj sreću, nego je sam stvori.
sentences.translationEn: Do not wait for happiness but create it yourself.
